idea-plugin.name: Kshana - PNT simulator
idea-plugin.description:
Run Kshana — the open, reproducible positioning/navigation/timing (PNT) resilience simulator — directly from your JetBrains IDE.

Right-click any scenario .toml and choose Run Kshana Scenario; the figures of merit and result JSON stream into the Kshana tool window. Set the path to the kshana binary in Settings → Tools → Kshana (install it with cargo install kshana).

Scenarios cover SGP4/SDP4 orbits, IAU reference frames, Allan deviations, GNSS availability/DOP, ARAIM protection levels, GNSS/INS fusion, and quantum-sensor models — each validated against published references. See https://kshana.dev.

action.description: Run the selected TOML as a Kshana scenario
